title: Unit Geography: 4NNB, 4NNC, and Everything Around Them

objectives.outcome: 7 priority spaces: APP office, attending office, Pyxis, conference rooms, lounge, EEG room, Code Blue room
ED, Mercy 1st-floor conference room, 6th-floor conference room
Procedure supplies for emergent intervention within 60 seconds

didactic_sections.heading: The Two NCC Pods
key_points: Cohort primary and co-managed to 4NBC when possible
Cohort consults to 4NBC if NCC issues dominate
Never delay OSH transfers for bed criteria — board post-hoc

spaces.name: APP Office
spaces.purpose: Sit between rounds, locker, printer, TigerConnect role board

spaces.name: Supply Pyxis
spaces.purpose: Cranial access kit, vent pack, CVC tray, A-line, LP, US-IV, ONB tray

spaces.name: Code Blue Room
spaces.purpose: Rapid response location; ICU vs overhead Code Blue distinction

spaces.name: 4th-floor Barrow Conference Room
spaces.purpose: Primary case conference and faculty meetings

didactic_sections.heading: Raumedic Kit Location
key_points: Raumedic Drill Kit CH5, Bolt Kit PTO, and Neurovent-PTO catheter are attached to the Raumedic pole at the bedside
Cranial access kit and ventriculostomy pack live in the Pyxis

spaces.name: Emergency Room
spaces.purpose: Stroke codes, status, deterioration; bring phone + protocols

didactic_sections.heading: 60-Second Drill
drill_items: Anisocoria + posturing on 4NNC → cranial access kit (Pyxis)
ICU-only Code Blue → confirm overhead activation
Find epileptologist → EEG reading room or Ice+EEG / Fire+EEG TigerConnect
Staff new aSAH → Attending Office or SJHMC NCC Attending TigerConnect role

linked_protocols: Admission Diagnosis Guidelines for NCC Pod 4NNC
nursing_considerations: Charge RN typically knows the current bed map better than anyone — start there for cohorting questions
RN will help verify overhead Code Blue activation
pharm_considerations: Pharmacy maintains the Pyxis stocking; if a high-acuity kit is missing, page pharmacy directly

visuals.subject: Annotated 4NNB/4NNC floor plan
visuals.notes: Pannable, zoomable; tap each room for description and photo

visuals.subject: Walking tour led by a senior APP
visuals.notes: 8-10 minutes, narrated, ends at Code Blue room

visuals.subject: Raumedic pole with kits attached
visuals.notes: Used in M01.L2 and revisited in M09.L3

visuals.subject: ICU Code Blue vs. Overhead Code Blue decision flow

assessment.item: ICU Code Blue vs. overhead Code Blue — clinical implication
Location of Raumedic kits at the moment of insertion
Rationale for cohorting consult patients to 4NBC
